# Webhook Delivery Module LLM Guide

Purpose: outbound mirror of the event bus. Delivers HMAC-signed domain events to
external endpoints (apps not on our Cloudflare account) and logs every attempt.

Entry points:
- `src/index.ts` exports the safe public surface.
- `src/use-cases/` contains framework-neutral behavior (registerEndpoint,
  listEndpoints, deliverEvent, listDeliveries).
- `src/signing.ts` signs/verifies outbound payloads (HMAC-SHA256).
- `src/ports/` defines WebhookEndpointStore, DeliveryLogStore, HttpClient.
- `src/adapters/` contains D1 + memory stores and fetch + memory http clients.
- `schemas/` and `openapi.json` describe API-facing contracts.
- `module.json` is the machine-readable module manifest.

Model:
- Sink module (external twin of layer 3). Consumes events, POSTs them out.
- Each endpoint holds its own signing secret (returned once at registration).
- Endpoint listing must redact signing secrets.
- Outbound body is HMAC-signed; non-2xx is a failed delivery.

Agent rules:
- Keep outbound HTTP behind the HttpClient port; keep use cases neutral.
- Never make real network calls in tests; use createMemoryHttpClient().
- Keep the delivery log append-only.
- Ask before changing migrations, external side-effects, or production deploy.
